name: @galerinaa/ext-tmf
description: Galerina .tmf format engine (Phase 2 #6) — TMX-256 integrity (TriMerkle-XOF/SHAKE256), container, KEM-DEM confidentiality, ML-DSA-65 signing. Crypto-on-core: bit-exact, deterministic.
note: Phase 2 engine (#6). Specs frozen in Galerina-R-AND-D/tmf/spec/*. Crypto runs bit-exact on the deterministic core (SHAKE256 via node:crypto; ML-DSA-65 via @noble/post-quantum, already a Galerina dep). No Rust, no photonic crypto (crypto-on-core / SPORE-SUBSTRATE-001). Slice 1 = TMX-256; next: container, KEM-DEM, signing, inclusion proofs.
